_doc.purpose: Localization companion for Stats_Derived.json. Holds en-us entries for the housekeeping-related derived stats.
_doc.stamina_tooltip_note: zh-cn source replaced its trailing %%notimplemented%% with a reference to %%chara_status_fatigue%% (now translated as 'Stamina' this session, see Chara_Status_loc.json). Stale en-us entry (still ending in %%notimplemented%%) removed from Stats_Derived.json and replaced here.

en-us.stats_derived_extended_stamina_tooltip:
Consumed when performing physical labor
Maximum is %%stats_base_Constitution%%*10 + other modifiers
Recovers via sleep or rest
When Stamina is too low, character enters a fatigued state - see the %%chara_status_fatigue%% status for details
en-us.stats_derived_cleaningThreshold_tooltip:
This value determines how dirty a room must get before the character decides to clean it - the lower it is, the more diligently they clean.
Default 3, minimum 2
en-us.stats_derived_cleanlinessSensitivity_too:
This value (a multiplier) determines how much mess a character can tolerate in a room - the higher it is, the less tolerant.
Default 1.0
en-us.stats_derived_wakeupOffset_tooltip:
Whether the character wakes up on time or stays up late, default 0 (on time).
When this value is above 0, the character goes to bed and wakes up early; below 0, they go to bed and wake up late.
